seo.title: Massage Platja d'Aro | Elybela Glow – Beauty & Wellness Centre
seo.description: Massage and beauty centre in Platja d'Aro (Playa de Aro), Costa Brava. Relaxing massages, maderoterapia, lash and brow lifting. Book your appointment via WhatsApp or Booksy.

hero.headline: Your Moment Starts Here
hero.subheadline: Beauty and wellness centre in Platja d'Aro · Costa Brava

about.title: Discover Elybela Glow
about.text: Discover Elybela Glow, your beauty and wellness oasis in Platja d'Aro. An exclusive space where every detail is designed for you to disconnect, relax and feel unique. Treat yourself to our relaxing massages, maderoterapia treatments and professional lash services, created to enhance your natural beauty and renew your energy.

exclusive.title: Exclusive treatments
exclusive.desc: Each session tailored to your needs

services.title: Our Treatments
services.subtitle: Every service designed to renew your energy and enhance your natural beauty

wellnessManos.name: Wellness Hands
benefits: Relieves pain in wrists and fingers

testimonials.label: Reviews
testimonials.heading: Be among the first to share your experience
testimonials.subheading: We just opened. Every visit matters to us and we'd love to know what you thought. Your feedback helps us keep improving.

google.desc: Share your experience on Google Maps and help others find us.

booksy.desc: If you booked through Booksy, you can rate your treatment directly there.

testimonials.title: What our clients say

items.text: I left feeling completely renewed. The relaxing massage was an incredible experience, Elybela's hands are magical. The atmosphere is welcoming and very professional.
items.name: Laura Martínez

items.text: My lash lifting lasted for weeks and looked perfect. I love how I feel walking out — natural and radiant. A beauty centre that truly cares about every detail.
items.name: Marta García

items.text: The maderoterapia exceeded all my expectations. I noticed the difference from the very first session. The treatment is very personalised and the setting is simply beautiful.
items.name: Sofía Ramos

cta.headline: Ready for your wellness moment?
cta.text: Book your appointment and treat yourself. We look forward to welcoming you in the heart of Platja d'Aro.
